title: Tickets to My Downfall
description: Tickets to My Downfall (2020) marks Machine Gun Kelly’s shift from rap to pop-punk, featuring a guitar-driven sound and collaborations with Travis Barker.

title: Lost Americana
description: Lost Americana is an upcoming project by Machine Gun Kelly, expected to explore themes of American culture and personal storytelling with a blend of genres.

title: Mainstream Sellout
description: Mainstream Sellout (2022) continues MGK’s pop-punk style, featuring energetic tracks and collaborations, building on the success of his previous album.
